reviews.comment:

The fuel service is standard. The cafeteria only accepts cash or bank transfers; no other options. This needs improvement, and the staff should treat you like a customer, not pity you.

reviews.comment:
Tienen que abrir antes, es la última parada y cierran de noche. La aduana abre a las 7 y hay gente haciendo fila desde antes. Sería bueno poder cargar en la madrugada antes de ir a la fila por que después es un lío salirse.

(Translated by Google)
They need to open earlier; it's the last stop and they close at night. Customs opens at 7:00 AM and there are already people queuing before then. It would be good to be able to load up in the early morning before going to the queue because it's a hassle to get out of the line later.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfdk9iR1lBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre San Juan dando lastima en sus servicios, en esta ocasión, está “ypf de las Flores” “estación de servicio”( no merece ese nombre) ubicada a pocos Km de aduana Argentina para el paso a Chile. 3/1/25 temporada alta, miles de autos…y los señores abren de 7 a 23??? Encima llegan a atender con mala cara, no hay servicio de agua caliente, no podes pagar con débito ni otros modos de pago que no sea efectivo….podria seguir diciendo todo malo de este lugar.
Bueno no existe calificacion para esto, que no sirve pra nada.
De modo que cdo salgan de sus casas, ignoren que existe posibilidad de cargar nafta aquí.

(Translated by Google)
As always, San Juan is a terrible place for its services. This time, it's a "YPF de las Flores" "service station" (it doesn't deserve that name) located a few kilometers from Argentine customs for the crossing into Chile. It's high season, thousands of cars... and the service people are open from 7 a.m. to 11 p.m.??? On top of that, they come across as rude, there's no hot water service, you can't pay with debit or any other payment method other than cash... I could go on and on about everything bad about this place.
Well, there's no way to describe this; it's useless.
So, when you leave your house, ignore the possibility of getting gas here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmME9qQl9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Como no van a tener abierto toda la noche con la cantidad de vehículos que pasan para Chile, una vergüenza que abran tan tarde.

(Translated by Google)
How can they not be open all night with the number of vehicles passing through to Chile? It's a disgrace that they open so late.

Un desastre el servicio, muy mala predisposición del los playeros, únicamente efectivo, los baños muy mugriento, para tomar un café tenes que esperar 30 minutos hasta que lo calienten 🤦‍♂️
